opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Something bit me in the garden, and now this massive, rock-hard lump is driving me insane with the itch.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A bite on my leg swelled into a hard itchy lump fast and I'm worried it's a dangerous bite or reaction.

symptom_narrative.onset: 4 hours ago while gardening — a sharp pinch on the calf
symptom_narrative.character: firm, indurated, intensely itchy wheal with a central bite mark
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: central puncture mark, mild warmth; NO breathing trouble, lip/tongue swelling, throat tightness, whole-body hives or dizziness

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; gardening in dense foliage (tick/insect exposure)

objective_data_offered.value: firm red itchy lump ~4cm with a central bite mark on the calf, visible on video
no breathing difficulty, no lip/tongue swelling, no whole-body hives
